UBit.ConWiFi:
Connects the UBit to the desired network. 
If this block is not used, it will connect to the Ceibal network.
UBit.Icon:
Enables/disables audio output for the 
icons shown on the micro:bit display.
UBit.RepNumtwithScreen: Plays the text or number via audio on the UBit and displays it on the screen.
UBit.RepText: Plays the written text via audio on the UBit.
UBit.RepTextwithScreen: Plays the text or number via audio on the UBit and displays it on the screen.
UBit.getLight: Get light level from an external micro:bit
UBit.getSound: Get sound level from an external micro:bit
UBit.getTemperature: Get the temperature in Celsius from a specified micro:bit.
UBit.onGestureReceived: Runs an action when a specific gesture is received via radio.
UBit.shareSensorsWithUBit:
Selects a radio channel to send the 
data requested by the micro:bit connected to the UBit.
_remoteLight:
Use this file to define custom functions and blocks.
Read more at https://makecode.microbit.org/blocks/custom
